name: voynichese-ir
description: The Voynich Manuscript reverse-engineered as a formal language: corpus normalization, grammar induction, parser, and linter. Syntax only — no translation attempted.

scripts.all: node src/parse_ivtff.js && node src/structure_shape.js && node src/lexical_glyph.js && node src/grammar.js && node src/refine.js && node src/export_grammar.js
